description: Dominican-inspired cocktail menu R&D website — interactive data viz + editorial storytelling

context.nextRnD: Negroni de Plátano Dorado — plantain infusion protocol

website.stack: Next.js 16 + TypeScript + Tailwind v4 + Framer Motion
website.status: Hero gap collapse + narrative redesign done. Ready for deploy.
completedPhases: Phase 1: Scaffold + data layer (Next.js, fonts, typed data)
Phase 2: Layout + nav + hero (SiteHeader, HeroSection, PhilosophySection)
Phase 3: Menu section + drink modal (CategoryTabs, DrinkCard, DrinkModal, DrinkRadar)
Phase 6: Visual Overhaul — SVG drink illustrations, interactive DR map, dynamic layout, background density
Phase 6.5: Hero gap collapse + NarrativeSection redesign with watercolor ingredient illustrations
website.fileCount: 36+ component files across data/, charts/, sections/, ui/, hooks/

recentDecisions: Hero outer div → motion.div with scroll-linked marginBottom to collapse dead space
WatercolorIngredient: dual-layer SVG (fill blob + hand-drawn stroke) — hybrid of WatercolorBlob and BotanicalIllustration patterns
Single scrollY listener in NarrativeSection, shared via prop to all 6 ingredients
Narrative copy rewritten: heritage-forward, evocative, mami/tía voice
Ingredients desktop-only (isMobile early return + hidden md:block)
